name: marco-polo
description: A visual geospatial scanner that plays Marco Polo with satellite imagery — draw an area, and it finds, measures, and ranks every swimming pool.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm --workspace @marco-polo/web run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web
